OUT 1782581640897 "\u001b[?2026h\u001b[2B\u001b[2K\u001b[1A\u001b[2K\u001b[1A\u001b[2K\u001b[1A\u001b[2K\u001b[1A\u001b[2K\u001b[1A\u001b[2K\u001b[1A\u001b[2K\u001b[1A\u001b[2K\u001b[1A\u001b[2K\u001b[G\u001b[1A\r\u001b[7A\u001b[91m·\u001b[39m \u001b[93mWibbling…\u001b[91m \u001b[37m(6s · ↓\u001b[39m \u001b[37m231 tokens)\u001b[39m\u001b[K\r\u001b[1B\u001b[K\r\u001b[1B\u001b[96m─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[106m\u001b[30m remi:18777 \u001b[49m\u001b[96m──\r\u001b[1B\u001b[37m❯ \u001b[39m\u001b[K\r\u001b[1B\u001b[96m───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\r\u001b[1C\u001b[1B\u001b[39m \u001b[37m[Opus 4.8] 4% context\u001b[85G◉ xhigh · /effort\r\u001b[2C\u001b[1B\u001b[95m⏵⏵ accept edits on\u001b[37m (shift+tab to cycle) · ← for agents\r\u001b[1B\u001b[39m\u001b[K\r\u001b[1B\u001b[K\r\u001b[1B\u001b[K\r\u001b[1B\u001b[K\r\u001b["

OUT 1782581646102 "\u001b[?2026h\u001b[?25l\u001b[3D\u001b[4B\r\u001b[2A\u001b[94m/pr-review-toolkit:review-pr     (pr-review-toolkit) Comprehensive PR review using specialized\u001b[39m\u001b[K\r\u001b[2C\u001b[1B                               \u001b[94magents\u001b[39m\u001b[K\r\r\n\u001b[37m/project:epic-dev\u001b[34G(project)\u001b[44GEpic/sprint\u001b[56Gdevelopment\u001b[68Gworkflow\u001b[77Gwith\u001b[82Ggit\u001b[86Gworktrees,\u001b[39m\r\r\n\u001b[34G\u001b[37mGitHub\u001b[41Gissues,\u001b[49Gand\u001b[53Gphased\u001b[60Gdelivery\u001b[39m\r\r\n\u001b[37m/workflow-reference\u001b[34G(project)\u001b[44GThis\u001b[49Gskill\u001b[55Gshould\u001b[62Gbe\u001b[65Gused\u001b[70Gwhen\u001b[75Gexecuting\u001b[85Gthe\u001b[89Gepic-dev\u001b[39m\r\r\n\u001b[34G\u001b[37mworkflow,\u001b[44Gcreating\u001b[53Gepic\u001b[58Gbranches,\u001b[68Gmanaging\u001b[77Gsprint\u001b[84Gphases,\u001b[92Gworking…\u001b[39m\r\r\n\u001b[37m/deep-research\u001b[34G[dynamic\u001b[43Gworkflow]\u001b[53GDeep\u001b[58Gresearch\u001b[67Gharness\u001b[75G—\u001b[77Gfan-out\u001b[85Gweb\u001b[89Gsearches,\u001b[39m\r\r\n\u001b[53G\u001b[37mfetch\u001b[59Gsources,\u001b[68Gadversarially\u001b[82Gverify\u001b[89Gclaims,\u001b[97Gsy…\u001b[39m\r\r\n\u001b[37m/project:init-project\u001b[34G(project)\u001b[44GInitialize\u001b[55Ga\u001b[57Gnew\u001b[61Gproject\u001b[69Gwith\u001b[74Gcross-agent\u001b[86Gvibe-rules\u001b[39m\r\r\n\u001b[34G\u001b[37mtemplates\u001b[39m\r\r\n\u001b[37m/add-dir\u001b[3"
